name: Coby
description: '''Slobodan Veljković''' ({{lang-sr-cyr|Слободан Вељковић}}, {{IPA|sh|slobǒdan ʋěːʎkoʋitɕ|pron}}; born 11 April 1985), known professionally as '''Coby''' ({{lang-sr-Cyrl-Latn|Цоби|separator=" / "|Cobi}}, {{IPA|sh|tsǒbi|pron}}), is a Serbian rapper, singer, songwriter and record producer.
